message:
fix(freeze): fix .u8 -> .loc and array_from memory leak

- Use .operand.loc instead of .operand.u8 for add_loc, dec_loc, inc_loc
  opcodes in cfg_builder.zig and codegen_ssa.zig (local index is u16)
- Remove incorrect FROZEN_FREE after JS_NewArrayFrom since it takes
  ownership of the values (no refcount bump)
